_source: Curated shortlist of clubs plausibly active in the July 2026 transfer window (Big-5 heavyweight buyers). Analogous to worldcup/data/tm_squad_values.json's hand-curation. Club strings MUST match the team_name spelling in big5_transfers.rds (verified against the transfer history).
_note: Restricts destination candidates to realistic 2026 buyers so the recommender does not surface clubs that were only active in 2014-2018. Falls back to all profiled clubs if a player has no shortlist overlap.
_prestige_note: Curated club-prestige weight in [0,1] — recent European/league pedigree and pulling power for elite talent. A soft tie-break so the affordability gate (which favors whichever club has the single highest historical spend, e.g. Man Utd) does not send every marquee player to the same destination. Hand-set, June 2026.
